title: juncus articulatus var. maritimus
intro: Juncus articulatus var. maritimus, also known as jointed rush or sea rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Juncus articulatus var. maritimus include its ability to help reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
